scripts.seo:fix: node scripts/render-product-pages.mjs && node scripts/critical-seo-fix.mjs && node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs
scripts.validate: node scripts/render-product-pages.mjs --check && node scripts/render-blog.mjs --check && node scripts/validate-content.mjs && node scripts/validate-site.mjs
scripts.build: node scripts/render-product-pages.mjs && node scripts/render-blog.mjs && node scripts/build.mjs
